flows.name: wopr-changeset-dummy
flows.description: Minimal scaffold of the wopr-changeset flow for testing — no gates, no onEnter hooks, stub prompts. Uses a distinct name to avoid collision with flows/wopr-changeset.json.

states.name: architecting
coding
reviewing
fixing
documenting
states.promptTemplate:
Update documentation for {{entity.refs.linear.key}}.

Say `docs_ready: {{entity.refs.linear.key}}` when done.
Say `cant_document` if not applicable.

states.name: learning
states.promptTemplate:
Extract lessons learned from {{entity.refs.linear.key}}.

Say `learning_complete` when done.
Say `cant_learn` if no lessons found.

constraints.description: Issue has been flagged 3+ times for the same finding. Requires human intervention.
